text.title: GitOps — Secrets and Security Failure Modes
text.summary: 4 antipatterns from real deployments. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Token committed in plaintext; leaks via fork.
antipattern.fix: Adopt SOPS or ESO; rotate compromised secret immediately.

antipattern.symptom: Encrypted file + age private key both in repo; encryption useless.
antipattern.fix: Move key to KMS / external keyring; rotate.

antipattern.symptom: Token from 2022 still in use; compromised state assumed.
antipattern.fix: Define cadence + automation for token rotation.

antipattern.symptom: ServiceAccount with cluster-admin; pod compromise = cluster takeover.
antipattern.fix: Refactor to namespace-scoped Role with explicit verbs.
